scripts.pack: npm run build:assets && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --dir
scripts.dist: npm run build:assets && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:assets && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:assets && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win
